// Generated by FrontComposer source generator
// Do not edit directly

#nullable enable

namespace TestDomain;

/// <summary>
/// Fluxor reducers for <see cref="OrderProjection"/> state transitions.
/// </summary>
public static class OrderProjectionReducers
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Handles <see cref="OrderProjectionLoadRequestedAction"/>.
    /// </summary>
    [Fluxor.ReducerMethod]
    public static OrderProjectionState OnOrderProjectionLoadRequested(OrderProjectionState state, OrderProjectionLoadRequestedAction action)
        => state with { IsLoading = true, Error = null };

    /// <summary>
    /// Handles <see cref="OrderProjectionLoadedAction"/>.
    /// </summary>
    [Fluxor.ReducerMethod]
    public static OrderProjectionState OnOrderProjectionLoaded(OrderProjectionState state, OrderProjectionLoadedAction action)
        => state with { IsLoading = false, Items = action.Items, Error = null };

    /// <summary>
    /// Handles <see cref="OrderProjectionLoadFailedAction"/>.
    /// </summary>
    [Fluxor.ReducerMethod]
    public static OrderProjectionState OnOrderProjectionLoadFailed(OrderProjectionState state, OrderProjectionLoadFailedAction action)
        => state with { IsLoading = false, Error = action.Error };
}
